Video.summary: Joni claims that Gina used to be one of her besties and that they were inseparable, from spending birthday trips out of town to girls’ nights out, often ending in Gina crashing at Joni’s house. Joni says all that changed when 23- year-old Gina began dating Joni’s 49-year-old father, David, behind her back and giving birth to David’s child. Joni says she feels betrayed by Gina and her father, even going as far as sharing her dislike for her former friend and father’s newfound romance on TikTok. Gina says the picture Joni paints of them being best friends is all a lie, but in any event, Joni needs to accept her relationship with Joni’s father. David says despite his daughter’s disapproval, he is going to continue being in a committed relationship with Gina, but that doesn’t mean he can’t also have a relationship with his daughter.
Video.title: 49-Year-Old Dad Dating Friend

Video.summary: From the outside, Jason and Shani had the perfect marriage " a big, beautiful house on the lake and three adorable boys " but recently Jason was crushed to learn that Shani's been having an affair with a mutual friend. Now, Shani is torn between her husband and her lover. What would you do?
Video.title: Is This Marriage Really Over?

Video.summary: Parents Liz and Jim say their 16-year-old son, Nic, has a serious drug problem that has such a hold on him, they claim he even stole $75,000 in gold from his parents’ safe and spent it all on drugs! But, Liz says she is convinced that her husband is to blame. Liz accuses Jim of being a narcissist and misogynist, whose parenting philosophy is based on intimidation and abuse, and claims that is what drove their son to drugs. Jim denies Liz’s allegations, claiming she has gone to great lengths to paint him as a villain. He says she is the major problem, and calls her the world's lousiest parent and a doormat who helped enable Nic's deadly addictions.
Video.title: Teen Drug Problem (Part 1)

Video.summary: Parents are concerned about the extreme measures their daughters take to get and keep a boyfriend.
Video.title: Teens Obsessed with Love

Video.summary: Christina and Jim are divorced, and their 21-year-old daughter, Tara, is living with her dad and his new wife who just happens to be the same age as Tara. Christina claims Jim was a horrible husband and a narcissist and she was forced to walk away from the family when Tara was just 13. Since then, she says Jim has let Tara get away with anything and now even allows her to work as a webcam model in order to help pay the bills! She says he is turning their daughter into a raging, angry monster with low self-esteem.
Video.title: "My Ex & My Daughter" (Part 1)

Video.summary: Imagine hearing voices that don't exist, thinking neighbors were controlling your behavior with magnetic waves, or that people on television were sending you secret messages. What if you constantly thought someone was following you, trying to poison you, out to get you? For those who suffer from schizophrenia, delusions and paranoia are part of daily life. Dr. Phil sheds light on a disease that is both complex and frightening.
Video.title: Schizophrenia

Video.summary: Ask any teenager, and he or she will tell you how tough life is: schoolwork, dating and dealing with pushy parents. But imagine having two kids while you're still in high school. Dr. Phil sits down with Corey and Kim, a troubled young couple, to see if their relationship can be saved.
Video.title: Troubled Teen Love

Video.summary: A viral video depicting a judge whipping his daughter sparks outrage.
Video.title: Discipline Video: Judge Accused

Video.summary: A father is fighting for custody of his 4 children because his ex-wife is allegedly in a cult.
Video.title: Are My Children in a Cult?

Image.alt: Are My Children in a Cult?
Are My Children in a Cult?
Are My Children in a Cult?
Are My Children in a Cult?
Are My Children in a Cult?
Are My Children in a Cult?
Are My Children in a Cult?

Video.summary: A self destructive teen or a bad role model for a Mom? Who is telling the truth?
Video.title: Teenage Wasteland

Video.summary: Angelique recounts escaping a life-threatening scheme while pregnant.
Video.title: Barely Escaping a Fetal Abduction

Video.summary: Meddling moms who track and monitor their children's lives.
Video.title: Meddling Moms

Video.summary: Laurie-Ann emailed Dr. Phil claiming she was robbed by her dangerous, narcissist ex-boyfriend and his new fiancée, Alison. She claims her ex, Michael, held her hostage for seven years. Laurie-Ann claims Michael and Alison are retaliating against her for breaking her silence and filing charges against Michael for domestic violence, emotional abuse, theft, and fraud. But Michael and Alison say Laurie-Ann is a liar who is always playing the victim. Michael says he never held her hostage; she only started to say that because he dumped her. Alison says she just wants Laurie-Ann to move on with her life, let them be happy, and stop stalking them. But Laurie-Ann says Alison doesn’t know how vindictive Michael really is and she claims he has turned everyone, including the police, against her. Laurie-Ann says she wants Dr. Phil to validate her story.
Video.title: Held Hostage By My Ex

Video.summary: Christina, 21, and her younger sister, Carlie, 13, say they had a close relationship with their father, Michael, until two years ago when he decided to transition to a female. Michael was a police officer, soldier and loving parent who lived his life as a male for 40 years. Now, he wants his daughters to call him Mom, because he says Dad is gone, but they refuse. Michael, who prefers to be called Kayla, says she wants to explain to her daughters why she's living as a woman, but they've never given her the chance. The last time Christina saw her father was two years ago when he showed up at her work in lace and blue jeans to break the news that he's transgendered. When she sees Kayla onstage, does she greet her with open arms? Next, Carlie joins her sister and father. She says she wants her old dad back, but will she feel the same after seeing Kayla? Can the father-daughter bond be turned into a mother-daughter one? Be prepared for an emotional journey as two daughters struggle to understand how someone they loved so much could hurt them so badly.
Video.title: Daddy Drama

Video.summary: Every bride wants to shine on her special day -- from wearing the perfect gown to hosting the most extravagant reception. But what happens when the dream of the perfect wedding turns into a nightmare? Janae knows about this pain firsthand. Her husband, Michael, got so drunk before the ceremony that he passed out cold after saying “I do” and didn’t wake up until the next day! Janae attended the reception by herself and spent her wedding night with her bridesmaids at a hotel. Their wedding from hell took place two years ago, but she still tears up at the memory of that fateful day. Can she ever forgive Michael's mishaps, or is he doomed to the doghouse forever? Then, Angela is a self-professed bridezilla who makes no excuses for her demanding ways. She even created a newsletter for her bridesmaids with the rules and regulations they must follow to participate in her wedding! Her sister and maid of honor, Vanessa, worries that Angela's nitpicking will cause her fiancé, Marvin, to run for the hills. What's behind Angela's controlling behavior, and is she headed for heartache on her special day?
Video.title: Hell Weddings

Video.summary: A woman believes she's going to be Vladimir Putin's wife.
Video.title: Homeless and “Engaged” to Putin?

Video.summary: In the summer of 2014, a former middle school English teacher was arrested on suspicion of statutory rape and contributing to the delinquency of a minor after police found her in a motel room with a 15-year-old former student. In a Dr. Phil exclusive, Jennifer Caswell speaks out for the first time. How does she explain her relationship with her former student?
Video.title: Teacher Scandal Confession

Video.summary: This is one powerful episode you can’t miss! Join us as Dr. Phil gives out-of-control mothers the tools they need to curb their offensive behavior. Learn how one single mother’s yelling and offensive language are driving away her teenage kids. Plus, one woman gave up a career to be a stay-at-home mom. Now regret and anxiety have taken over to create a potentially dangerous situation for her children. Whether dealing with teenagers or toddlers, every parent knows that unrelated stress can lead to unwanted outbursts. Learn through these courageous moms how you can be a better parent.
Video.title: Can't Stand Being a Mom

Video.summary: In this powerful program, Dr. Phil exposes the frightening yet underreported problem of mothers on the verge on committing child abuse. We meet ordinary women who live in fear that they’re going to hurt their children in a fit of uncontrollable rage. Chrystel says she feels rage and snaps and then it gets to the point where there's no return. Jessica says her fits of rage become so intense, she's scared that she will hurt her son. Answering their desperate pleas for help, Dr. Phil explains how to identify cues leading up to this precarious state, and tells moms what to do when they start to lose control.
Video.title: Moms on the Verge Part 1

Video.summary: In this powerful program, Dr. Phil once again exposes the frightening yet underreported problem of mothers on the verge of committing child abuse. We meet ordinary women who live with the fear that they’re going to hurt their children in a fit of uncontrollable rage. Joanna says her rage is scaring her son. Michelle’s rage has driven her to slap her child and hit her with a wooden spoon. Lisa admits to pulling her daughter’s hair when she gets angry. Answering their desperate pleas for help, Dr. Phil explains how to identify cues leading up to this precarious state, and tells moms what to do when they start to lose control.
Video.title: Moms on the Verge Part 2

Video.summary: These moms are sick and tired of living a lie. One mom fears her secret addiction to pain killers will tear her family apart. She asks Dr. Phil to help her get off the drugs before she loses everything, including her unborn child! Also, a grandmother who steals everything from steaks to ceiling fans. She says she knows it’s wrong and wants to stop, but is she really just afraid of getting caught? Plus, a mother confesses to her daughter a secret she has been carrying for 29 years.
Video.title: Mom's Secret Life

Video.summary: Their job is to protect you. They won't let you walk down the street alone. They call your house five times a day, screen your calls, monitor your every move. No, it's not the government or the F.B.I., it's mothers! Is there such a thing as a mom having too much love for her child? Dr. Phil puts Mom to the test!
Video.title: Overprotective Moms

Video.summary: Dr. Phil continues his exclusive jailhouse interview with Kelli Stapleton, a mother accused of trying to kill herself and her severely autistic 14-year-old daughter, Issy. Were there any warning signs that she was reaching her breaking point? And, find out how you can help Issy secure a healthy and productive future.
Video.title: Driven To Try And Kill Her Child? (Pt. 2)

Image.alt: Driven To Try And Kill Her Child? (Pt. 2)
Driven To Try And Kill Her Child? (Pt. 2)
Driven To Try And Kill Her Child? (Pt. 2)
Driven To Try And Kill Her Child? (Pt. 2)
Driven To Try And Kill Her Child? (Pt. 2)
Driven To Try And Kill Her Child? (Pt. 2)
Driven To Try And Kill Her Child? (Pt. 2)

Video.summary: Courtney claims that after her parents’ divorce six years ago, her mother, Michelle, became a “party girl” who basically traded in her children for a life of parties, drinking and men. Courtney says her mother’s dangerous behavior has already resulted in 2 DUIs and a serious car accident that nearly killed her. Courtney says her greatest fear is that “the next time I see my mom will be at her funeral.” Michelle claims that after her divorce, Courtney and her two other children went on with their lives without her, and says that’s why she turned to friends, men and drinking. What does Dr. Phil say Michelle must do to save her life and save her relationship with her children?
Video.title: My Mom Is A Party Girl

Image.alt: My Mom Is A Party Girl
My Mom Is A Party Girl
My Mom Is A Party Girl
My Mom Is A Party Girl
My Mom Is A Party Girl
My Mom Is A Party Girl
My Mom Is A Party Girl

Video.summary: Statistics show that 2,000 teens get pregnant every day. Moms and dads: Watch this show with your teenagers, because it can impact their lives and yours! Two families face off over who should raise baby Miley. Paige, 17, and her boyfriend, Jordan, 18, are determined to raise their child on their own, even though they live with Jordan’s dad, Chris. Nikki, Paige’s stepmom, thinks she and her husband should raise the child, because they can better provide for her, and she wants Paige to break up with Jordan. Why does she believe that Jordan is brainwashing Paige? The teen dad says Nikki is the one who’s controlling, and he’s stepped up to the plate. Will the families come to an agreement? See what Dr. Phil tells them they must do to ensure Miley grows up in a healthy environment. Plus, find out the 10 things teens want their parents to know about teen sex.
Video.title: Fight Over Teen's Baby

Video.summary: Daniel Pelosi was convicted of second-degree murder in the slaying of investment banker and multimillionaire Ted Ammon -- the husband of his lover, Generosa. He is currently serving 25 years to life but now claims he is ready to explain what really happened the night of the murder. Dr. Phil visits Pelosi behind bars.
Video.title: High Society Whodunit

Video.summary: Dr. Phil gives family freeloaders a wake-up call.
Video.title: Get Your Act Together

Video.summary: Children accuse their dad of neglect.
Video.title: Deadbeat Dads

Video.summary: We've all heard of in-laws who don't get along, but these guests say their problems have become scary and even life-threatening.
Video.title: In-Law Threats!

Video.summary: A headline making story of a husband’s affair with a co-worker that led to murder. Now the wife and the mistress come face to face for the first time.
Video.title: A Deadly Love Affair

Video.summary: A mom is supposed to love and nurture her children, but what if she's too involved? Reed, 33, says his mother, Margaret, is so meddling, manipulative and controlling that the day she dies will be a cause for celebration, not mourning. He claims she uses bribes to control his every move, including offering him $20,000 to divorce his first wife. Margaret admits that she can be pushy and difficult but says she just wants to see her son succeed in life. Is she really setting him up for failure? Does Reed really want to man-up and break free from his mother's grasp? And, is Margaret willing to let him go? Then, 35-year-old Anthony, star of the new TLC reality show Mama's Boys of the Bronx, says he sees nothing wrong with living at home and letting his mom, Patti, wait on him hand and foot. How does Patti feel about their living arrangement? Will she ever kick Anthony out? Plus, hear how Anthony's lifestyle affects his dating life. If you know of a mother-son bond that's a little too close for comfort, don't miss this Dr. Phil. Reed, 33, says his mother, Margaret, is so meddling and controlling that the day she dies will be a cause for celebration. Margaret says she wants to see her son succeed - but is she setting him up for failure? Plus, 35-year-old Anthony, star of TLC's Mama's Boys of the Bronx, says he sees nothing wrong with living at home.
Video.title: Over The Top Moms

Video.summary: What happens when you can't let go of a meaningful relationship from the past? What are the boundaries when getting in touch with an old flame while you're married? Although toying with old flames can get you burned, it can also be the spark that rekindles lost love.
Video.title: Old Flames
